keyword_tiers.description: Broad, high-intent keywords that reflect the primary services customers search for. These are the bread-and-butter terms — high volume, high conversion, and versatile across all markets.
Service-specific keywords for stump removal and grinding. Customers searching these terms have a very specific, immediate need — high conversion potential.
Keywords targeting Durham's structural demolition services. These represent a distinct service vertical with strong commercial intent.
High-urgency, high-intent keywords for emergency tree removal and storm damage cleanup. These terms target customers with immediate needs and a strong propensity to call.

full_keyword_list.keyword: storm damage tree removal near me
bucket truck tree service near me

not_used_groups.description: These high-value keywords were identified and validated but could not be included within the 40-combination limit of the Level C plan. They are the first candidates for inclusion upon upgrading.

not_used_groups.reason: Demolition service — reserved for targeted expansion
not_used_groups.description: These demolition-related keywords represent a distinct service vertical. Due to the 40-combination limit, they are reserved for a dedicated expansion tier where they can receive proper coverage.

not_used_groups.reason: Emergency & storm services — reserved for targeted expansion
not_used_groups.description: Emergency and storm-related keywords carry high urgency and conversion potential. These are best served with dedicated content and are prioritized for the next plan upgrade.

additional_opportunities.headline: Expand Into Demolition & Emergency Services
additional_opportunities.description: Upgrading to Level D adds 10 additional keyword-city combinations, allowing us to introduce dedicated coverage for Durham's demolition services and emergency tree removal — two high-intent service categories currently outside the plan's capacity.

additional_opportunities.headline: Add a Sixth Market & Deeper Keyword Coverage
additional_opportunities.description: Level E opens the door to a sixth target market — Bartow (pop. 19,801), the Polk County seat — while also adding deeper coverage for stump grinding and tree cutting service keywords across all existing markets.

additional_opportunities.headline: Full Polk County Domination
additional_opportunities.description: Level F provides the coverage needed to dominate all major Polk County markets. With 90 total combinations, we can target up to 9 cities with a full suite of keywords — achieving comprehensive visibility across the entire county for every core service Durham's offers.
